description: A carrier's driver has completed a delivery and needs to upload the signed Bill of Lading as Proof of Delivery.

nodes.task_description: Using a mobile app, the driver selects the shipment that was just delivered.

expected_outcome.expected: Driver correctly identifies the shipment record.

nodes.task_description: The driver takes a picture of the signed BOL.

expected_outcome.expected: A clear image of the signed document is captured.

nodes.task_description: The driver uploads the image and captures the name of the signatory.

expected_outcome.expected: The POD image and signatory name are successfully uploaded to the TMS.
